title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to 8086 Microprocessor, Architecture, Addressing Modes,
Instruction Set, 8086 Interfacing and I/O Operations, Programming the 8086,
Features of 8051 Microcontroller, Internal Block Diagram of 8051, Memory
organization, Timer and Counters, I/O ports, Interrupt Structure. ARM
Microcontroller Architecture and Programming

title: Module 2
content:
Introduction to IoT and its components, IoT building blocks, IoT boards,
Overview of Arduino, Arduino Architecture, Types of Arduino Boards and
Components, Specifications, Comparison of different variants of Arduino,
Arduino Development Environment, Digital and Analog I/O, Sensor and
Actuator Interfacing, Communication Protocols.

title: Module 3
content:
Raspberry Pi: Hardware Components, Setting Up Raspberry Pi,
Programming on Raspberry Pi, Python basics for Raspberry Pi, GPIO
interfacing, Interfacing with Peripherals, Networking and Communication,
IoT and Cloud Integration.

title: Module 4
content:
Overview of NodeMCU and its significance in IoT, Architecture and
features of NodeMCU (ESP826), NodeMCU Hardware Components,
NodeMCU boards (NodeMCU v1.0, NodeMCU v2), Setting Up the
NodeMCU Development Environment, Basic I/O Operations, IoT
communication protocols (HTTP, MQTT).
